score.notes: fit 9: BI & Database Lead — Power BI/DAX, Snowflake, SQL, ETL/ELT, data governance, data dictionaries/metadata, data-quality monitoring, self-serve BI — maps directly to data-quality-program (dbt tests + data dictionary), self-serve-dashboards, warehouse-cost-cut (Snowflake/BigQuery), and reporting-turnaround. comp 6: £50-60k (~$63-76k), clears floor, below target. visa 3 (low conf): Midlands UK, office-based with travel — relocation+sponsorship needed; sponsorship unstated. remote 2: onsite. growth 8: lead role, enterprise scope, predictive analytics + governance ownership. Weighted: 9*3+6*2+3*2+2*1.5+8*1.5 = 27+12+6+3+12 = 60 → standard (borderline).

next_action.action: Decide before investing: strong fit but onsite UK — confirm visa sponsorship is on offer
